dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Overview of your business — orders, invoices, production, and cash flow at a glance.
dashboard.placeholder: Your business overview will appear here once Sprint 6 is complete.

orders.title: Orders
orders.description: Track and manage all customer orders from creation to dispatch.
orders.placeholder: Order management will be available here once Sprint 3 is complete.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.description: Create, send, and track GST-compliant invoices for all your customers.
invoices.placeholder: Invoice management will be available here once Sprint 3 is complete.

customers.title: Customers
customers.description: Manage your customer database, order history, and payment records.
customers.placeholder: Customer management will be available here once Sprint 3 is complete.

vendors.title: Vendors
vendors.description: Manage suppliers, purchase orders, and vendor payments.
vendors.placeholder: Vendor management will be available here once Sprint 5 is complete.

production.title: Production
production.description: Track batch progress, machine utilisation, and production targets.
production.placeholder: Production tracking will be available here once Sprint 5 is complete.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Monitor defect rates, inspection results, and quality trends.
quality.placeholder: Quality dashboards will be available here once Sprint 5 is complete.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.description: Track raw materials, finished goods, and stock levels in real time.
inventory.placeholder: Inventory tracking will be available here once Sprint 5 is complete.

cashFlow.title: Cash Flow
cashFlow.description: Monitor receivables, payables, and your net cash position.
cashFlow.placeholder: Cash flow analysis will be available here once Sprint 6 is complete.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.description: Stay on top of GST filings, labour law requirements, and regulatory deadlines.
compliance.placeholder: Compliance tools will be available here once Sprint 7 is complete.

sopBuilder.title: SOP Builder
sopBuilder.description: Create and share standard operating procedures for your factory floor.
sopBuilder.placeholder: SOP Builder will be available here once Sprint 7 is complete.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your organisation profile, billing, team members, and integrations.
settings.placeholder: Settings will be available here once Sprint 7 is complete.

featureGate.upgradeMessage: Upgrade to unlock production tracking, quality dashboards, and more.
